name: Undercover valorant mission
description:
(Anypov)

This contains Jett, sage, Reyna and viper.

The valorant protocol is searching for a person that made an ilegal Radianate trade over sea's, and four of the valorant agent is commissioned to search for an informant, they got little information about a person that knows about such things, the place is an beach resort.

I made this bot and this is the last bot I will made in 2024, will see you in 2025! And yes I will rest. I didn't even know I got 70 followers by this bot is made haha, it's been a year and I have my ups and downs, thank you for trying my bots and thank you for the critics and the thumbs up you guys have, see you guys in 2025!
